azurefox lighthouse

╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────────┬───────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│scope                                             │managing tenant│managed tenant     │access                                                                           │state               │why it matters                                                             │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼───────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│subscription::22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222│Contoso Corp.  │AzureFox Lab Tenant│strongest=Owner; auth=2; eligible=1; delegated-role-assign=yes; plan=contoso-plan│assignment=Succeeded│managed by Contoso Corp.; strongest role Owner; 1 eligible authorization(s)│
│resource-group::rg-platform                       │Fabrikam Ops   │AzureFox Lab Tenant│strongest=Contributor; auth=1; eligible=0                                        │assignment=Succeeded│managed by Fabrikam Ops; strongest role Contributor                        │
│resource-group::rg-logging                        │Northwind MSP  │AzureFox Lab Tenant│strongest=Reader; auth=1; eligible=0                                             │assignment=Succeeded│managed by Northwind MSP; strongest role Reader                            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────┴───────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 3 Azure Lighthouse delegation(s) visible; 1 are subscription-scoped, 1 grant Owner or User Access Administrator, and 1 include eligible access.
